creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Comment on attachment 175843
Patch for grafana3_conf to work and have the default documented correctly

For reference, there was no maintainer approval. The commit log message (see: comment 3) ought instead have mentioned:

Approved by: maintainer timeout (2 weeks) 

If that was the basis under which is was committed

The second follow up commit should have had the same Approved by line as the first.

Correctly set maintainer-approval flag (to -) to record maintainer timeout and implicit approval.
